title: Full Stack Developer focused on clean architecture and scalability
paragraphs: I am a Full Stack Developer with experience building complete web applications from frontend interfaces to backend services. I work with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and relational/non-relational databases, applying clean architecture principles and scalable design patterns.

I focus on writing maintainable code, designing clear APIs, and delivering performant user experiences. I am comfortable working across the full development lifecycle, from planning and implementation to deployment.
